prompt: Create a breathtaking hyper-realistic vertical cinematic portrait of a stylish young man sitting alone on the hood of a black Ferrari-style luxury sports car with a carbon-fiber hood in a massive empty desert with rolling sand dunes during a surreal total solar eclipse. The composition is centered and dramatic: the man faces the camera, seated on the front hood with both hands resting near his knees, while the huge black disk of the eclipse sits directly behind his head like a glowing halo, with an intense golden corona and bright sun flare on the upper right edge. His face should be covered by a plain vertical brown rectangular placeholder with no facial features. Show exactly four main visible outfit/accessory pieces: a warm brown suede jacket, a black turtleneck, black pants, and a silver chain necklace. The black sports car fills the lower half of the frame, showing glossy reflections, carbon fiber texture, angular headlights, windshield, side mirror, and a small yellow shield-style badge on the hood. Use warm golden-hour desert lighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric detail, cinematic lens flare, drifting sand particles and dust sparks in the foreground, moody amber atmosphere, ultra-detailed 8k photorealism, no text, no watermark.
